The Certiﬁcate will equip students to develop successful careers through teaching excellence and study abroad programs.

Interested students should contact the Coordinator of the Certiﬁcate Program, Yuli Wang, Department of East Asian Languages and Cultures, 2106C Jimenez Hall, ywang26@umd.edu (website at http:// ceas.umd.edu/#certiﬁcate/).
